steps.screen:
[22CIt is written in the Book of Hermes:

[26CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[26Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[26CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[26Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[26Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[26CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[22CYour god Hermes seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[22Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

   lqq~qqk[12CYou, a newly trained Rhizotomist, have been heralded
   x~~~~~x[12Cfrom birth as the instrument of Hermes.  You are destined
   x~~~~~[13Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
   x~~~~~x[12Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
   x~~~~[97md[39mx[12Cof us all:  Go bravely with Hermes!
   x~[93m:[39m~~[97m@[39mx[12C--More--
   mqqqqqj
